title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Jared Sires built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API and Claude Code that drafts customer replies in a sales rep's own voice. The tool aims to reduce administrative burden in sales teams by automating email composition while preserving personal voice and context.
